speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Health advice
questions: What should people do to stay healthy?
What shouldn't people eat too much of?
Should you see a doctor often?
speaking.sampleAnswer: People should exercise and drink enough water. They shouldn't eat too much sugar or fast food. Yes, you should see a doctor for regular check-ups.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: School and work obligations
questions: Do you have to wear a uniform?
Do you have to work on weekends?
What do you have to do every morning?
speaking.sampleAnswer: No, I don't have to wear a uniform. I don't have to work on weekends either. I have to check my emails every morning.
